parameters.prompt: One original isolated photorealistic vacuum-capable induction carbine, 0.86 m long and at most 0.27 m high. Full shoulder stock, sealed monolithic receiver spine, long enclosed accelerator shroud, removable rectangular power-and-flechette magazine ahead of the grip, compact optic, ambidextrous controls, protected trigger, thermal fins, sling sockets and service seams. Functional hard-surface science fiction with a distinct non-AR silhouette, long axis +Z. No Picatinny rails, M4 or AK shapes, person, hands, ammunition, floating parts, text, logo, stand, ground or background.
parameters.texture_prompt: De-lit original induction carbine: dark phosphate steel accelerator core and controls, graphite anodized receiver, charcoal fiber-reinforced stock and grip, heat-darkened ceramic shroud, low-glare optic, restrained amber witness ports and localized handling wear. No baked highlights, pseudo-text, logos, glowing strips, camouflage, broad grime or damage.

strengths: single connected full-stock weapon with a distinct enclosed receiver and accelerator shroud
avoids the rejected M4 silhouette while preserving readable grip, trigger, magazine and shoulder interface
survives principal-axis and three-quarter geometry review without detached parts
required_cleanup: replace this monolithic study with separately generated and authored components
verify first-person grip, shoulder, sightline and suited-glove clearances on the assembled component asset
keep ballistics, collision, sockets, pivots and moving-part state authored
art_review.disposition: do not refine or promote the monolithic preview
